reference: Under my ribs on the right side is hurting when I breathe, cough, or even clear my throat. I got choked on some meat Wednesday night, and this right side has hurt since, but it has been worse today. I had to leave work at nine a.m. this morning. I don't know if it is the spleen or if I have cracked a rib when I was coughing so hard while choking.
text: Under my ribs, on the right side, is hurting from the brain, from the cough, or even clear my throat. I got choked on some lean once the night. This right side has hurt since, but it has been worse today. I had the wee word and I didn't get this morning. I don't know if it is this green, or if I have cracked the ribs when I was coughing so hard while choking.
